summary: Implemented floating share button with Web Share API support, clipboard fallback, and toast notifications. Created share-button.css (44px circular button positioned above info button), toast.css (centered pill with visible/error variants), share-button.ts (DOM factory), toast.ts (auto-dismissing toast with 2.5s timeout), share-action.ts (Web Share API → clipboard fallback with AbortError handling), and wired everything in main.ts. All US-015 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
